title: catevala coarctata
intro: Catevala coarctata, also known as narrow-leaved cat's ear, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Catevala coarctata include its potential to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and an antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, Catevala coarctata is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment.
